title: 10 herbal concoctions for men struggling with baldness
description: Boswellia serrata essential oils, also known as frankincense oil, has been traditionally used to help with baldness due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The main constituents of this oil, including boswellic acids, alpha-pinene, and beta-pinene, help to reduce inflammation in the scalp and promote hair growth.
